selectionRules: NP pathways (registry list); routable; exclude duplicate_or_unclear_source and not_routable; sort structural/content gaps first, then US NP track order (FNP→AGPCNP→PMHNP→WHNP→PNP-PC→CA NP), then overallScore asc; cap 100.
